interventions.name: A3 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: algorithm-comparison matrices that require correctness, efficiency, clarity, and resource criteria to be named explicitly

interventions.name: A3 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: tradeoff prompts asking what one bounded design gains and what it sacrifices

interventions.name: A3 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: problem-framing tasks that restate input, output, and constraint conditions before comparing approaches

interventions.name: A3 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired analysis work using the same comparison structure across a second algorithm family
